name: Manually fill all 3 steps including Secondary Financial Institution
description:
Filling the Secondary Financial Institution dropdown manually alongside
all other fields should not block form submission.

steps.name: Go to Add Deal page (New Client mode)
Complete full deal flow using manual form entry (all 3 steps)
